description: The IFRC is preparing an Anticipatory Action trigger for Dzud events in Mongolia. Using Panoply and the climate datasets in ~/PanoplyData/, analyze the precipitation and temperature climatology for the central Mongolian Steppe (47.0°N, 105.0°E). Create a 1D line plot of the annual precipitation cycle and a 2D map of January temperatures. Save a baseline report containing the key quantitative values requested in ~/Desktop/dzud_index_brief.txt to ~/Documents/dzud_report.txt.
